data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for transitioning from discovery facts to explicit share request.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to transition from discovery facts to an explicit share request, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the business process but do not address the specific need for this transition, indicating a lack of necessary validation evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the ability to transition from discovery facts to explicit share request.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the transition from discovery facts to explicit share request.
